articles.title: What are ‘Ethereum killers’ and what are their prospects with Eth2 under way?
articles.description: With Ethereum 2.0 still in development, rival blockchains like Cardano, Binance Smart Chain, Solana and Polkadot are hot on Eth's tail. Who might prevail, and why?

articles.title: Traders hope for a new altcoin season now that Bitcoin turned $45K to support
articles.description: Bitcoin’s consecutive daily closes above $45,000 were followed by a 40% rally from ICP, RVN, VGX and EGLD, leading traders to believe that a new altcoin season is starting.

articles.title: SushiSwap Says Optimism Showed Favoritism to Uniswap During Layer 2 Launch
articles.description: SushiSwap has accused Optimism of showing favoritism towards Uniswap during the launch of its Layer 2 network. The criticism highlights concerns about the fairness and accessibility of the platform, suggesting that Uniswap received preferential treatment that could impact the competition within the decentralized finance (DeFi) space.

articles.title: Price analysis 8/11: BTC, ETH, BNB, ADA, XRP, DOGE, DOT, UNI, LINK, SOL
articles.description: Bitcoin and most major altcoins remain above their respective 200-day moving average but the market's momentum will depend on whether BTC can pierce the $48,000 level.

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ether Maintain Upward Trend: Markets Wrap
